name: Tavily
description: AI-powered search and content extraction API for building intelligent agents. Get real-time search results, extract webpage content, and crawl websites.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Tavily provides AI-powered search and content extraction APIs optimized for agents. Get accurate, real-time search results with citations, extract full webpage content, and crawl websites intelligently. **Search API** offers different depths (basic, advanced, fast, ultra-fast). **Extract API** fetches clean content from URLs. **Crawl/Map APIs** navigate entire sites. Get API key at [Tavily](https://app.tavily.com/).

Authorization.description: Bearer token for Tavily API authentication (Environment variable: TAVILY_API_KEY). Format: 'Bearer tvly-YOUR_API_KEY'

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Perform AI-powered web search with configurable depth, filters, and optional LLM-generated answers

search_depth.description: Search depth: 'basic' (balanced), 'advanced' (highest relevance, 2 credits), 'fast' (low latency), 'ultra-fast' (minimum latency)

include_domains.description: List of domains to specifically include in results (max 300)

exclude_domains.description: List of domains to exclude from results (max 150)

include_answer.description: Include LLM-generated answer: 'basic'/'true' (quick answer), 'advanced' (detailed answer), or false

include_raw_content.description: Include cleaned/parsed content: 'markdown'/'true' (markdown format), 'text' (plain text), or false

include_images.description: Perform image search and include image results

include_image_descriptions.description: Include descriptive text for each image (requires include_images=true)

include_favicon.description: Include favicon URL for each result

chunks_per_source.description: Max chunks per source (max 500 chars each, 1-3). Only with search_depth='advanced'

country.description: Boost results from specific country (only with topic='general')

exact_match.description: Only return results containing exact quoted phrase(s)

auto_parameters.description: Automatically configure parameters based on query (may set search_depth to advanced)

safe_search.description: Filter adult/unsafe content (Enterprise only, not supported for fast/ultra-fast)

include_usage.description: Include credit usage information in response

tools.name: Extract
tools.description: Extract clean, structured content from one or more URLs with optional LLM-based reranking

urls.description: URL(s) to extract content from (single URL string or array of URLs)

query.description: User intent for reranking extracted content chunks by relevance

chunks_per_source.description: Max relevant chunks per source (500 chars each, 1-5). Only with query parameter

extract_depth.description: Extraction depth: 'basic' (standard content, 1 credit/5 URLs), 'advanced' (tables, embedded content, 2 credits/5 URLs)

include_images.description: Include list of images extracted from URLs

include_favicon.description: Include favicon URL for each result

timeout.description: Maximum wait time in seconds (1.0-60.0). Default: 10s for basic, 30s for advanced

include_usage.description: Include credit usage information in response

tools.name: Crawl
tools.description: Intelligently crawl and extract content from multiple pages of a website with configurable depth and filters

url.description: Root URL to begin the crawl

instructions.description: Natural language instructions for the crawler (increases cost to 2 credits/10 pages)

chunks_per_source.description: Max relevant chunks per source (500 chars each, 1-5). Only with instructions

max_depth.description: Max crawl depth from base URL (1-5)

max_breadth.description: Max links to follow per page (1-500)

limit.description: Total links to process before stopping (minimum 1)

select_paths.description: Regex patterns to select URLs with specific paths (e.g., '/docs/.*', '/api/v1.*')

select_domains.description: Regex patterns to restrict to specific domains (e.g., '^docs\.example\.com$')

exclude_paths.description: Regex patterns to exclude URL paths (e.g., '/private/.*', '/admin/.*')

exclude_domains.description: Regex patterns to exclude specific domains (e.g., '^private\.example\.com$')

allow_external.description: Include external domain links in results

include_favicon.description: Include favicon URL for each result

include_usage.description: Include credit usage information in response

tools.name: Map
tools.description: Discover and map URLs from a website without extracting content. Fast way to find relevant pages.

instructions.description: Natural language instructions for the mapper (increases cost to 2 credits/10 pages)

max_depth.description: Max mapping depth from base URL (1-5)

max_breadth.description: Max links to follow per page (1-500)

limit.description: Total links to process before stopping (minimum 1)

select_paths.description: Regex patterns to select URLs with specific paths (e.g., '/docs/.*')

select_domains.description: Regex patterns to restrict to specific domains

exclude_paths.description: Regex patterns to exclude URL paths (e.g., '/admin/.*')

exclude_domains.description: Regex patterns to exclude specific domains

allow_external.description: Include external domain links in results

include_usage.description: Include credit usage information in response

tools.name: Research
tools.description: Comprehensive research API for in-depth analysis on complex topics with multi-step search and synthesis

query.description: The research query or topic to analyze

max_results.description: Maximum search results per search iteration

include_usage.description: Include credit usage information in response

tools.name: Get Usage
tools.description: Get current API usage information including credits consumed and remaining
